title: BEM-1284 minimal loop
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Create file governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

READINESS_LEVEL='FUNCTIONAL'
TRACE_ID='bem1284-minimal-local-e2e'

def event(step:int, role:str, status:str, payload:dict[str,Any])->dict[str,Any]:
    return {'step':step,'role':role,'status':status,'payload':payload}

def run_loop(task:str='minimal governance loop local e2e')->dict[str,Any]:
    events=[]
    events.append(event(1,'GD_CURATOR','input_received',{'task':task,'target_curator':'EL-CUR-GD-001'}))
    events.append(event(2,'GD_CURATOR','vertical_task_sent',{'target':'EL-CUR-DIR-001'}))
    events.append(event(3,'DIR_CURATOR','vertical_task_assigned',{'target':'EL-CUR-WRK-001'}))
    events.append(event(4,'ANALYST','proposal_prepared',{'proposal':'execute deterministic local loop'}))
    events.append(event(5,'AUDITOR','proposal_approved',{'decision':'approve'}))
    events.append(event(6,'EXECUTOR','execution_result_submitted',{'result':'deterministic_result'}))
    events.append(event(7,'AUDITOR','result_approved',{'decision':'approve'}))
    events.append(event(8,'WRK_CURATOR','vertical_result_returned',{'target':'EL-CUR-DIR-001'}))
    events.append(event(9,'DIR_CURATOR','vertical_report_sent',{'target':'EL-CUR-GD-001'}))
    events.append(event(10,'GD_CURATOR','operator_report_ready',{'format':'canonical'}))
    return {'trace_id':TRACE_ID,'readiness_level':READINESS_LEVEL,'gate':'Gate 2 Minimal local E2E','status':'pass','release_pass':False,'events':events,'timestamp_utc':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}

def main()->int:
    result=run_loop()
    out=Path('governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json')
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(result,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+'\n',encoding='utf-8')
    print(json.dumps(result,ensure_ascii=False,sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__=='__main__':
    raise SystemExit(main())

Create file tests/governance/test_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path


def test_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop_local_e2e():
    path=Path('governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py')
    result=subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(path)],capture_output=True,text=True,check=True)
    payload=json.loads(result.stdout)
    assert payload['readiness_level']=='FUNCTIONAL'
    assert payload['gate']=='Gate 2 Minimal local E2E'
    assert payload['status']=='pass'
    assert payload['release_pass'] is False
    roles=[event['role'] for event in payload['events']]
    assert roles==['GD_CURATOR','GD_CURATOR','DIR_CURATOR','ANALYST','AUDITOR','EXECUTOR','AUDITOR','WRK_CURATOR','DIR_CURATOR','GD_CURATOR']
    last_run=Path('governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json')
    assert last_run.exists()
    saved=json.loads(last_run.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert saved['trace_id']=='bem1284-minimal-local-e2e'
